title.hi: भाव चलित  –  भाव पद्धति की विस्तृत व्याख्या
title.mai: भाव चलित – भाव प्रणाली बुझाओल गेल अछि

subtitle.en: Understanding the difference between sign-based and degree-based house placement  –  and why it matters for prediction.
subtitle.hi: राशि-आधारित और अंश-आधारित भाव स्थापन के बीच का अन्तर  –  और भविष्यवाणी के लिए यह क्यों महत्वपूर्ण है।
subtitle.mai: राशि-आधारित आ अंश-आधारित भावक स्थानक बीचक अंतर बुझब – आ ई फलादेशक लेल किएक महत्वपूर्ण अछि।
subtitle.ta: Understanding the difference between sign-based and degree-based house placement  –  and why it matters for prediction.
subtitle.te: Understanding the difference between sign-based and degree-based house placement  –  and why it matters for prediction.
subtitle.bn: Understanding the difference between sign-based and degree-based house placement  –  and why it matters for prediction.
subtitle.gu: Understanding the difference between sign-based and degree-based house placement  –  and why it matters for prediction.
subtitle.kn: Understanding the difference between sign-based and degree-based house placement  –  and why it matters for prediction.
subtitle.mr: Understanding the difference between sign-based and degree-based house placement  –  and why it matters for prediction.

whatIsBody1.en: In the standard Rashi chart (D1), the sky is divided into 12 houses based on sign boundaries. Each sign equals one house. Simple, elegant  –  but approximate.
whatIsBody1.hi: मानक राशि कुण्डली (D1) में आकाश को राशि सीमाओं के आधार पर 12 भावों में विभाजित किया जाता है। प्रत्येक राशि = एक भाव। सरल, सुन्दर  –  किन्तु अनुमानित।
whatIsBody1.mai: मानक राशि कुंडली (D1) मे, आकाश केँ राशि सीमाक आधार पर १२ भाव मे बाँटल जाइत अछि। प्रत्येक राशि एक भावक बराबर होइत अछि। सरल, सुंदर – मुदा अनुमानित।
whatIsBody1.ta: In the standard Rashi chart (D1), the sky is divided into 12 houses based on sign boundaries. Each sign equals one house. Simple, elegant  –  but approximate.
whatIsBody1.te: In the standard Rashi chart (D1), the sky is divided into 12 houses based on sign boundaries. Each sign equals one house. Simple, elegant  –  but approximate.
whatIsBody1.bn: In the standard Rashi chart (D1), the sky is divided into 12 houses based on sign boundaries. Each sign equals one house. Simple, elegant  –  but approximate.
whatIsBody1.gu: In the standard Rashi chart (D1), the sky is divided into 12 houses based on sign boundaries. Each sign equals one house. Simple, elegant  –  but approximate.
whatIsBody1.kn: In the standard Rashi chart (D1), the sky is divided into 12 houses based on sign boundaries. Each sign equals one house. Simple, elegant  –  but approximate.
whatIsBody1.mr: In the standard Rashi chart (D1), the sky is divided into 12 houses based on sign boundaries. Each sign equals one house. Simple, elegant  –  but approximate.

whatIsBody2.en: The Bhava Chalit chart takes a different approach. Here, the ascendant degree becomes the exact midpoint of the 1st house. Houses are then measured as 30-degree arcs centered on each cusp  –  not on sign boundaries.
whatIsBody2.hi: भाव चलित कुण्डली एक भिन्न दृष्टिकोण अपनाती है। यहाँ लग्न अंश प्रथम भाव का सटीक मध्य बिन्दु बनता है। भाव फिर प्रत्येक भाव सन्धि पर केन्द्रित 30-अंश के चापों के रूप में मापे जाते हैं  –  राशि सीमाओं पर नहीं।
whatIsBody2.mai: भाव चलित कुंडली एकटा भिन्न दृष्टिकोण अपनाबैत अछि। एतय, लग्नक अंश पहिल भावक ठीक मध्यबिंदु बनि जाइत अछि। भाव सभ केँ तखन प्रत्येक संधि पर केंद्रित ३०-अंशक चापक रूप मे मापल जाइत अछि – राशि सीमा पर नहि।
whatIsBody2.ta: The Bhava Chalit chart takes a different approach. Here, the ascendant degree becomes the exact midpoint of the 1st house. Houses are then measured as 30-degree arcs centered on each cusp  –  not on sign boundaries.
whatIsBody2.te: The Bhava Chalit chart takes a different approach. Here, the ascendant degree becomes the exact midpoint of the 1st house. Houses are then measured as 30-degree arcs centered on each cusp  –  not on sign boundaries.
whatIsBody2.bn: The Bhava Chalit chart takes a different approach. Here, the ascendant degree becomes the exact midpoint of the 1st house. Houses are then measured as 30-degree arcs centered on each cusp  –  not on sign boundaries.
whatIsBody2.gu: The Bhava Chalit chart takes a different approach. Here, the ascendant degree becomes the exact midpoint of the 1st house. Houses are then measured as 30-degree arcs centered on each cusp  –  not on sign boundaries.
whatIsBody2.kn: The Bhava Chalit chart takes a different approach. Here, the ascendant degree becomes the exact midpoint of the 1st house. Houses are then measured as 30-degree arcs centered on each cusp  –  not on sign boundaries.
whatIsBody2.mr: The Bhava Chalit chart takes a different approach. Here, the ascendant degree becomes the exact midpoint of the 1st house. Houses are then measured as 30-degree arcs centered on each cusp  –  not on sign boundaries.

whatIsBody3.en: This means a planet at 29 degrees of a sign might be in House 5 in the Rashi chart, but House 6 in the Bhava Chalit. Neither is wrong  –  they answer different questions.
whatIsBody3.hi: इसका अर्थ है कि किसी राशि के 29 अंश पर स्थित ग्रह राशि कुण्डली में भाव 5 में हो सकता है, किन्तु भाव चलित में भाव 6 में। कोई भी गलत नहीं है  –  दोनों भिन्न प्रश्नों का उत्तर देते हैं।
whatIsBody3.mai: एकर अर्थ अछि जे कोनो राशिक २९ अंश पर रहल ग्रह राशि कुंडली मे भाव ५ मे भऽ सकैत अछि, मुदा भाव चलित मे भाव ६ मे। दुनू मे सँ कोनो गलत नहि अछि – ओ सभ भिन्न प्रश्नक उत्तर दैत अछि।
whatIsBody3.ta: This means a planet at 29 degrees of a sign might be in House 5 in the Rashi chart, but House 6 in the Bhava Chalit. Neither is wrong  –  they answer different questions.
whatIsBody3.te: This means a planet at 29 degrees of a sign might be in House 5 in the Rashi chart, but House 6 in the Bhava Chalit. Neither is wrong  –  they answer different questions.
whatIsBody3.bn: This means a planet at 29 degrees of a sign might be in House 5 in the Rashi chart, but House 6 in the Bhava Chalit. Neither is wrong  –  they answer different questions.
whatIsBody3.gu: This means a planet at 29 degrees of a sign might be in House 5 in the Rashi chart, but House 6 in the Bhava Chalit. Neither is wrong  –  they answer different questions.
whatIsBody3.kn: This means a planet at 29 degrees of a sign might be in House 5 in the Rashi chart, but House 6 in the Bhava Chalit. Neither is wrong  –  they answer different questions.
whatIsBody3.mr: This means a planet at 29 degrees of a sign might be in House 5 in the Rashi chart, but House 6 in the Bhava Chalit. Neither is wrong  –  they answer different questions.

whyMattersNature.en: The Rashi chart tells you a planet's NATURE  –  its sign-based qualities, dignity, and inherent tendencies.
whyMattersNature.hi: राशि कुण्डली ग्रह का स्वभाव बताती है  –  उसके राशि-आधारित गुण, गरिमा और अन्तर्निहित प्रवृत्तियाँ।
whyMattersNature.mai: राशि कुंडली अहाँ केँ एकटा ग्रहक प्रकृति बताबैत अछि – ओकर राशि-आधारित गुण, गरिमा, आ अंतर्निहित प्रवृत्ति सभ।
whyMattersNature.ta: The Rashi chart tells you a planet's NATURE  –  its sign-based qualities, dignity, and inherent tendencies.
whyMattersNature.te: The Rashi chart tells you a planet's NATURE  –  its sign-based qualities, dignity, and inherent tendencies.
whyMattersNature.bn: The Rashi chart tells you a planet's NATURE  –  its sign-based qualities, dignity, and inherent tendencies.
whyMattersNature.gu: The Rashi chart tells you a planet's NATURE  –  its sign-based qualities, dignity, and inherent tendencies.
whyMattersNature.kn: The Rashi chart tells you a planet's NATURE  –  its sign-based qualities, dignity, and inherent tendencies.
whyMattersNature.mr: The Rashi chart tells you a planet's NATURE  –  its sign-based qualities, dignity, and inherent tendencies.

whyMattersAction.en: The Bhava Chalit tells you WHERE that planet actually ACTS  –  which life area receives its energy.
whyMattersAction.hi: भाव चलित बताती है कि वह ग्रह वास्तव में कहाँ कार्य करता है  –  किस जीवन क्षेत्र को उसकी ऊर्जा प्राप्त होती है।
whyMattersAction.mai: भाव चलित अहाँ केँ बताबैत अछि जे ओ ग्रह वास्तव मे कतय कार्य करैत अछि – जीवनक कोन क्षेत्र मे ओकर ऊर्जा प्राप्त होइत अछि।
whyMattersAction.ta: The Bhava Chalit tells you WHERE that planet actually ACTS  –  which life area receives its energy.
whyMattersAction.te: The Bhava Chalit tells you WHERE that planet actually ACTS  –  which life area receives its energy.
whyMattersAction.bn: The Bhava Chalit tells you WHERE that planet actually ACTS  –  which life area receives its energy.
whyMattersAction.gu: The Bhava Chalit tells you WHERE that planet actually ACTS  –  which life area receives its energy.
whyMattersAction.kn: The Bhava Chalit tells you WHERE that planet actually ACTS  –  which life area receives its energy.
whyMattersAction.mr: The Bhava Chalit tells you WHERE that planet actually ACTS  –  which life area receives its energy.

whyMattersExample.en: Example: Jupiter in Leo (Rashi) = generous, dramatic wisdom. But if Bhava Chalit puts Jupiter in the 10th house instead of 9th, that wisdom manifests through career and authority, not through dharma and higher learning.
whyMattersExample.hi: उदाहरण: सिंह में गुरु (राशि) = उदार, नाटकीय ज्ञान। किन्तु यदि भाव चलित गुरु को 9वें के बजाय 10वें भाव में रखती है, तो वह ज्ञान कैरियर और अधिकार के माध्यम से प्रकट होता है, धर्म और उच्च शिक्षा के माध्यम से नहीं।
whyMattersExample.mai: उदाहरण: सिंह राशि मे बृहस्पति (राशि) = उदार, नाटकीय ज्ञान। मुदा यदि भाव चलित बृहस्पति केँ ९म भावक बदला मे १०म भाव मे रखैत अछि, तँ ओ ज्ञान करियर आ अधिकारक माध्यम सँ प्रकट होइत अछि, धर्म आ उच्च शिक्षाक माध्यम सँ नहि।
whyMattersExample.ta: Example: Jupiter in Leo (Rashi) = generous, dramatic wisdom. But if Bhava Chalit puts Jupiter in the 10th house instead of 9th, that wisdom manifests through career and authority, not through dharma and higher learning.
whyMattersExample.te: Example: Jupiter in Leo (Rashi) = generous, dramatic wisdom. But if Bhava Chalit puts Jupiter in the 10th house instead of 9th, that wisdom manifests through career and authority, not through dharma and higher learning.
whyMattersExample.bn: Example: Jupiter in Leo (Rashi) = generous, dramatic wisdom. But if Bhava Chalit puts Jupiter in the 10th house instead of 9th, that wisdom manifests through career and authority, not through dharma and higher learning.

calculationTitle.mai: एकर गणना केना कएल जाइत अछि?

calcStep1.en: Step 1: Find the exact ascendant degree (e.g., Sagittarius 20°29' = 260.48° sidereal)
calcStep1.hi: चरण 1: सटीक लग्न अंश ज्ञात करें (उदा., धनु 20°29' = 260.48° साइडरियल)
calcStep1.mai: चरण १: ठीक लग्नक अंश पता लगाउ (जकाँ, धनु २०°२९' = २६०.४८° सायन)
calcStep1.ta: Step 1: Find the exact ascendant degree (e.g., Sagittarius 20°29' = 260.48° sidereal)
calcStep1.te: Step 1: Find the exact ascendant degree (e.g., Sagittarius 20°29' = 260.48° sidereal)
calcStep1.bn: Step 1: Find the exact ascendant degree (e.g., Sagittarius 20°29' = 260.48° sidereal)

calcStep1.mr: Step 1: Find the exact ascendant degree (e.g., Sagittarius 20°29' = 260.48° sidereal)

calcStep2.en: Step 2: The midpoint of House 1 (Bhava Madhya) = 260.48°
calcStep2.hi: चरण 2: भाव 1 का मध्य बिन्दु (भाव मध्य) = 260.48°
calcStep2.ta: Step 2: The midpoint of House 1 (Bhava Madhya) = 260.48°
calcStep2.te: Step 2: The midpoint of House 1 (Bhava Madhya) = 260.48°
calcStep2.bn: Step 2: The midpoint of House 1 (Bhava Madhya) = 260.48°
calcStep2.gu: Step 2: The midpoint of House 1 (Bhava Madhya) = 260.48°
calcStep2.kn: Step 2: The midpoint of House 1 (Bhava Madhya) = 260.48°
calcStep2.mr: Step 2: The midpoint of House 1 (Bhava Madhya) = 260.48°

calcStep3.en: Step 3: The boundary (Bhava Sandhi) between House 12 and House 1 = 260.48° − 15° = 245.48°
calcStep3.ta: Step 3: The boundary (Bhava Sandhi) between House 12 and House 1 = 260.48° − 15° = 245.48°
calcStep3.te: Step 3: The boundary (Bhava Sandhi) between House 12 and House 1 = 260.48° − 15° = 245.48°

calcStep3.gu: Step 3: The boundary (Bhava Sandhi) between House 12 and House 1 = 260.48° − 15° = 245.48°
calcStep3.kn: Step 3: The boundary (Bhava Sandhi) between House 12 and House 1 = 260.48° − 15° = 245.48°
calcStep3.mr: Step 3: The boundary (Bhava Sandhi) between House 12 and House 1 = 260.48° − 15° = 245.48°

calcStep4.en: Step 4: Each house spans 30° centered on its madhya
calcStep4.hi: चरण 4: प्रत्येक भाव अपने मध्य पर केन्द्रित 30° तक फैला है
calcStep4.mai: चरण ४: प्रत्येक भाव अपन मध्य पर केंद्रित ३०° तक फैलल अछि
calcStep4.ta: Step 4: Each house spans 30° centered on its madhya
calcStep4.te: Step 4: Each house spans 30° centered on its madhya
calcStep4.bn: Step 4: Each house spans 30° centered on its madhya
calcStep4.gu: Step 4: Each house spans 30° centered on its madhya
calcStep4.kn: Step 4: Each house spans 30° centered on its madhya
calcStep4.mr: Step 4: Each house spans 30° centered on its madhya

calcStep5.en: Step 5: Check if any planet falls in a different 30° arc than its sign
calcStep5.hi: चरण 5: जाँचें कि क्या कोई ग्रह अपनी राशि से भिन्न 30° चाप में आता है
calcStep5.mai: चरण ५: जाँच करू जे कोनो ग्रह अपन राशि सँ भिन्न ३०° चाप मे पड़ैत अछि की

calcStep5.te: Step 5: Check if any planet falls in a different 30° arc than its sign

equalDesc.en: The system described above is the Equal Bhava system  –  each house is exactly 30°. This is the most commonly used system in the North Indian Parashari tradition and is what our app uses.
equalDesc.hi: ऊपर वर्णित पद्धति समान भाव पद्धति है  –  प्रत्येक भाव ठीक 30° का है। यह उत्तर भारतीय पराशरी परम्परा में सबसे अधिक प्रयुक्त पद्धति है और हमारा ऐप इसी का उपयोग करता है।
equalDesc.mai: ऊपर वर्णित प्रणाली समान भाव प्रणाली अछि – प्रत्येक भाव ठीक ३०° क होइत अछि। ई उत्तर भारतीय पराशरी परंपरा मे सबसँ बेसी उपयोग कएल जाएब बला प्रणाली अछि आ ई ओहि अछि जे हमर ऐप उपयोग करैत अछि।
equalDesc.ta: The system described above is the Equal Bhava system  –  each house is exactly 30°. This is the most commonly used system in the North Indian Parashari tradition and is what our app uses.
equalDesc.te: The system described above is the Equal Bhava system  –  each house is exactly 30°. This is the most commonly used system in the North Indian Parashari tradition and is what our app uses.

equalDesc.mr: The system described above is the Equal Bhava system  –  each house is exactly 30°. This is the most commonly used system in the North Indian Parashari tradition and is what our app uses.

sripatiDesc.en: The Sripati system uses unequal houses  –  conceptually similar to the Placidus system in Western astrology. Here house sizes vary based on latitude and time, making calculations more complex but potentially more precise for higher latitudes.
sripatiDesc.hi: श्रीपति पद्धति असमान भावों का उपयोग करती है  –  पश्चिमी ज्योतिष की प्लेसिडस पद्धति के समान। यहाँ भाव का आकार अक्षांश और समय के आधार पर बदलता है, जो गणना को अधिक जटिल किन्तु उच्च अक्षांशों के लिए सम्भावित रूप से अधिक सटीक बनाता है।
sripatiDesc.mai: श्रीपति प्रणाली असमान भावक उपयोग करैत अछि – अवधारणात्मक रूप सँ पश्चिमी ज्योतिष मे प्लासिडस प्रणालीक समान। एतय भावक आकार अक्षांश आ समयक आधार पर भिन्न होइत अछि, गणना केँ बेसी जटिल बनाबैत अछि मुदा उच्च अक्षांशक लेल संभावित रूप सँ बेसी सटीक।
sripatiDesc.ta: The Sripati system uses unequal houses  –  conceptually similar to the Placidus system in Western astrology. Here house sizes vary based on latitude and time, making calculations more complex but potentially more precise for higher latitudes.
sripatiDesc.te: The Sripati system uses unequal houses  –  conceptually similar to the Placidus system in Western astrology. Here house sizes vary based on latitude and time, making calculations more complex but potentially more precise for higher latitudes.

bphsNote.en: BPHS does not prescribe a specific house system for Bhava Chalit  –  this remains an area of active scholarly debate.
bphsNote.hi: BPHS भाव चलित के लिए कोई विशिष्ट भाव पद्धति निर्धारित नहीं करता  –  यह सक्रिय विद्वत् विवाद का विषय बना हुआ है।
bphsNote.mai: BPHS भाव चलितक लेल कोनो विशिष्ट भाव प्रणाली निर्धारित नहि करैत अछि – ई सक्रिय विद्वत्तापूर्ण बहसक क्षेत्र बनल अछि।
bphsNote.ta: BPHS does not prescribe a specific house system for Bhava Chalit  –  this remains an area of active scholarly debate.
bphsNote.te: BPHS does not prescribe a specific house system for Bhava Chalit  –  this remains an area of active scholarly debate.
bphsNote.bn: BPHS does not prescribe a specific house system for Bhava Chalit  –  this remains an area of active scholarly debate.

debateParashari.en: Many traditionalists in the Parashari school prefer the whole-sign Rashi chart for ALL readings. They argue Bhava Chalit adds unnecessary complexity and that the ancient texts do not mandate it. Their view: the sign IS the house.
debateParashari.hi: पराशरी सम्प्रदाय के अनेक परम्परावादी सभी पठन के लिए सम्पूर्ण-राशि कुण्डली को प्राथमिकता देते हैं। उनका तर्क है कि भाव चलित अनावश्यक जटिलता जोड़ती है और प्राचीन ग्रन्थ इसे अनिवार्य नहीं करते। उनका दृष्टिकोण: राशि ही भाव है।
debateParashari.mai: पराशरी विद्यालय मे बहुत रास परंपरावादी सभ फलादेशक लेल पूर्ण-राशि कुंडली केँ पसंद करैत अछि। ओ सभ तर्क दैत अछि जे भाव चलित अनावश्यक जटिलता जोड़ैत अछि आ प्राचीन ग्रंथ एकरा अनिवार्य नहि करैत अछि। ओकर सभक विचार: राशि भाव अछि।
debateParashari.ta: Many traditionalists in the Parashari school prefer the whole-sign Rashi chart for ALL readings. They argue Bhava Chalit adds unnecessary complexity and that the ancient texts do not mandate it. Their view: the sign IS the house.
debateParashari.te: Many traditionalists in the Parashari school prefer the whole-sign Rashi chart for ALL readings. They argue Bhava Chalit adds unnecessary complexity and that the ancient texts do not mandate it. Their view: the sign IS the house.
debateParashari.bn: Many traditionalists in the Parashari school prefer the whole-sign Rashi chart for ALL readings. They argue Bhava Chalit adds unnecessary complexity and that the ancient texts do not mandate it. Their view: the sign IS the house.

debateParashari.kn: Many traditionalists in the Parashari school prefer the whole-sign Rashi chart for ALL readings. They argue Bhava Chalit adds unnecessary complexity and that the ancient texts do not mandate it. Their view: the sign IS the house.

debateKNRao.en: K.N. Rao's school strongly advocates using Bhava Chalit alongside D1. His method: use D1 for basic nature, Bhava Chalit for prediction. "When a planet changes houses, use the Bhava house for timing events."
debateKNRao.hi: के.एन. राव का सम्प्रदाय D1 के साथ भाव चलित के उपयोग का दृढ़ समर्थन करता है। उनकी विधि: मूल स्वभाव के लिए D1, भविष्यवाणी के लिए भाव चलित। "जब कोई ग्रह भाव बदलता है, तो घटना के समय निर्धारण के लिए भाव चलित भाव का प्रयोग करें।"
debateKNRao.mai: के.एन. राव क विद्यालय D1 क संग भाव चलितक उपयोग करबाक दृढ़ता सँ वकालत करैत अछि। ओकर विधि: D1 केँ मूलभूत प्रकृतिक लेल उपयोग करू, भाव चलित केँ फलादेशक लेल। "जखन कोनो ग्रह भाव बदलैत अछि, घटनाक समय निर्धारणक लेल भाव भावक उपयोग करू।"
debateKNRao.ta: K.N. Rao's school strongly advocates using Bhava Chalit alongside D1. His method: use D1 for basic nature, Bhava Chalit for prediction. "When a planet changes houses, use the Bhava house for timing events."
debateKNRao.te: K.N. Rao's school strongly advocates using Bhava Chalit alongside D1. His method: use D1 for basic nature, Bhava Chalit for prediction. "When a planet changes houses, use the Bhava house for timing events."

debateKP.en: KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) uses the Placidus house system  –  similar in concept to Bhava Chalit but with unequal houses. KP practitioners never use whole-sign houses.
debateKP.hi: KP (कृष्णमूर्ति पद्धति) प्लेसिडस भाव पद्धति का प्रयोग करती है  –  भाव चलित के समान अवधारणा किन्तु असमान भावों के साथ। KP अभ्यासी कभी सम्पूर्ण-राशि भावों का उपयोग नहीं करते।
debateKP.mai: केपी (कृष्णमूर्ति पद्धति) प्लासिडस भाव प्रणाली उपयोग करैत अछि – अवधारणा मे भाव चलितक समान मुदा असमान भावक संग। केपी व्यवसायी कहियो पूर्ण-राशि भावक उपयोग नहि करैत अछि।
debateKP.ta: KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) uses the Placidus house system  –  similar in concept to Bhava Chalit but with unequal houses. KP practitioners never use whole-sign houses.
debateKP.te: KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) uses the Placidus house system  –  similar in concept to Bhava Chalit but with unequal houses. KP practitioners never use whole-sign houses.
debateKP.bn: KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) uses the Placidus house system  –  similar in concept to Bhava Chalit but with unequal houses. KP practitioners never use whole-sign houses.
debateKP.gu: KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) uses the Placidus house system  –  similar in concept to Bhava Chalit but with unequal houses. KP practitioners never use whole-sign houses.
debateKP.kn: KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) uses the Placidus house system  –  similar in concept to Bhava Chalit but with unequal houses. KP practitioners never use whole-sign houses.
debateKP.mr: KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) uses the Placidus house system  –  similar in concept to Bhava Chalit but with unequal houses. KP practitioners never use whole-sign houses.

debateSouth.en: The South Indian tradition tends to rely more heavily on the Rashi chart. Bhava Chalit is less emphasized  –  the Rashi chart and divisional charts together form the primary toolkit.
debateSouth.hi: दक्षिण भारतीय परम्परा राशि कुण्डली पर अधिक निर्भर करती है। भाव चलित पर कम बल दिया जाता है  –  राशि कुण्डली और वर्ग कुण्डलियाँ मिलकर प्राथमिक उपकरण बनाती हैं।
debateSouth.mai: दक्षिण भारतीय परंपरा राशि कुंडली पर बेसी निर्भर करबाक प्रवृत्ति रखैत अछि। भाव चलित पर कम जोर देल जाइत अछि – राशि कुंडली आ वर्ग कुंडली एक संग प्राथमिक उपकरण बनबैत अछि।
debateSouth.ta: The South Indian tradition tends to rely more heavily on the Rashi chart. Bhava Chalit is less emphasized  –  the Rashi chart and divisional charts together form the primary toolkit.
debateSouth.te: The South Indian tradition tends to rely more heavily on the Rashi chart. Bhava Chalit is less emphasized  –  the Rashi chart and divisional charts together form the primary toolkit.
debateSouth.bn: The South Indian tradition tends to rely more heavily on the Rashi chart. Bhava Chalit is less emphasized  –  the Rashi chart and divisional charts together form the primary toolkit.
debateSouth.gu: The South Indian tradition tends to rely more heavily on the Rashi chart. Bhava Chalit is less emphasized  –  the Rashi chart and divisional charts together form the primary toolkit.
debateSouth.kn: The South Indian tradition tends to rely more heavily on the Rashi chart. Bhava Chalit is less emphasized  –  the Rashi chart and divisional charts together form the primary toolkit.
debateSouth.mr: The South Indian tradition tends to rely more heavily on the Rashi chart. Bhava Chalit is less emphasized  –  the Rashi chart and divisional charts together form the primary toolkit.

debateConsensus.en: Most working astrologers check BOTH. If D1 and Bhava Chalit agree (planet in same house), that is the strongest indication. When they disagree, the astrologer uses judgment based on the specific question being asked.
debateConsensus.hi: अधिकांश कार्यरत ज्योतिषी दोनों की जाँच करते हैं। यदि D1 और भाव चलित सहमत हों (ग्रह एक ही भाव में), तो वह सबसे मजबूत संकेत है। जब वे असहमत हों, तो ज्योतिषी पूछे जा रहे विशिष्ट प्रश्न के आधार पर निर्णय करता है।
debateConsensus.mai: बेसीतर कार्यरत ज्योतिषी दुनू केँ जाँच करैत अछि। यदि D1 आ भाव चलित सहमत होइत अछि (ग्रह एकहि भाव मे), तँ ओ सबसँ प्रबल संकेत अछि। जखन ओ सभ असहमत होइत अछि, तँ ज्योतिषी पूछल जा रहल विशिष्ट प्रश्नक आधार पर निर्णयक उपयोग करैत अछि।
debateConsensus.ta: Most working astrologers check BOTH. If D1 and Bhava Chalit agree (planet in same house), that is the strongest indication. When they disagree, the astrologer uses judgment based on the specific question being asked.
debateConsensus.te: Most working astrologers check BOTH. If D1 and Bhava Chalit agree (planet in same house), that is the strongest indication. When they disagree, the astrologer uses judgment based on the specific question being asked.
debateConsensus.bn: Most working astrologers check BOTH. If D1 and Bhava Chalit agree (planet in same house), that is the strongest indication. When they disagree, the astrologer uses judgment based on the specific question being asked.
debateConsensus.gu: Most working astrologers check BOTH. If D1 and Bhava Chalit agree (planet in same house), that is the strongest indication. When they disagree, the astrologer uses judgment based on the specific question being asked.
debateConsensus.kn: Most working astrologers check BOTH. If D1 and Bhava Chalit agree (planet in same house), that is the strongest indication. When they disagree, the astrologer uses judgment based on the specific question being asked.
debateConsensus.mr: Most working astrologers check BOTH. If D1 and Bhava Chalit agree (planet in same house), that is the strongest indication. When they disagree, the astrologer uses judgment based on the specific question being asked.

usePrediction.en: Predicting events (dasha, transit) → Bhava Chalit preferred by many
usePrediction.hi: घटनाओं की भविष्यवाणी (दशा, गोचर) → अनेक लोग भाव चलित को प्राथमिकता देते हैं
usePrediction.mai: घटनाक फलादेश (दशा, गोचर) → बहुत रास द्वारा भाव चलित पसंद कएल जाइत अछि

useYogas.en: Yogas → Rashi chart (most yoga definitions use sign-based houses)
useYogas.hi: योग → राशि कुण्डली (अधिकांश योग परिभाषाएँ राशि-आधारित भावों का उपयोग करती हैं)
useYogas.mai: योग सभ → राशि कुंडली (बेसीतर योगक परिभाषा राशि-आधारित भावक उपयोग करैत अछि)

useAspects.hi: दृष्टि → दोनों मान्य हैं; पराशरी दृष्टि राशि का उपयोग करती है, कुछ भाव का

exampleRashi.en: In Rashi chart: Taurus is the 6th sign from Sagittarius → Mars in House 6
exampleRashi.hi: राशि कुण्डली में: वृषभ धनु से 6वीं राशि है → मंगल भाव 6 में
exampleRashi.mai: राशि कुंडली मे: वृषभ धनु सँ ६म राशि अछि → मंगल भाव ६ मे

exampleResult.en: Mars at 58° falls in Bhava 6 range (35°–65°). So Mars is in House 6 in both Rashi and Bhava Chalit  –  no shift.
exampleResult.hi: 58° पर मंगल भाव 6 सीमा (35°–65°) में आता है। अतः मंगल राशि और भाव चलित दोनों में भाव 6 में है  –  कोई स्थानान्तरण नहीं।
exampleResult.mai: ५८° पर मंगल भाव ६ क सीमा (३५°–६५°) मे पड़ैत अछि। ताहि लेल मंगल दुनू राशि आ भाव चलित मे भाव ६ मे अछि – कोनो बदलाव नहि।
exampleResult.ta: Mars at 58° falls in Bhava 6 range (35°–65°). So Mars is in House 6 in both Rashi and Bhava Chalit  –  no shift.
exampleResult.te: Mars at 58° falls in Bhava 6 range (35°–65°). So Mars is in House 6 in both Rashi and Bhava Chalit  –  no shift.
exampleResult.bn: Mars at 58° falls in Bhava 6 range (35°–65°). So Mars is in House 6 in both Rashi and Bhava Chalit  –  no shift.
exampleResult.gu: Mars at 58° falls in Bhava 6 range (35°–65°). So Mars is in House 6 in both Rashi and Bhava Chalit  –  no shift.
exampleResult.kn: Mars at 58° falls in Bhava 6 range (35°–65°). So Mars is in House 6 in both Rashi and Bhava Chalit  –  no shift.
exampleResult.mr: Mars at 58° falls in Bhava 6 range (35°–65°). So Mars is in House 6 in both Rashi and Bhava Chalit  –  no shift.

exampleShiftNote.en: Now imagine Mars at Taurus 3° (= 33° sidereal). It would still be House 6 in the Rashi chart (Taurus = 6th sign from Sagittarius), but in Bhava Chalit it falls in Bhava 5 range (5°–35°)  –  a meaningful shift from enemies/service to children/creativity.
exampleShiftNote.hi: अब कल्पना करें मंगल वृषभ 3° (= 33° साइडरियल) पर। राशि कुण्डली में यह अभी भी भाव 6 होगा (वृषभ = धनु से 6वीं राशि), किन्तु भाव चलित में यह भाव 5 सीमा (5°–35°) में आता है  –  शत्रु/सेवा से संतान/रचनात्मकता की ओर एक सार्थक स्थानान्तरण।
exampleShiftNote.mai: आब कल्पना करू जे मंगल वृषभ ३° (= ३३° सायन) पर अछि। ई अखनो राशि कुंडली मे भाव ६ मे रहत (वृषभ = धनु सँ ६म राशि), मुदा भाव चलित मे ई भाव ५ क सीमा (५°–३५°) मे पड़ैत अछि – शत्रु/सेवा सँ संतान/रचनात्मकता दिस एकटा सार्थक बदलाव।
exampleShiftNote.ta: Now imagine Mars at Taurus 3° (= 33° sidereal). It would still be House 6 in the Rashi chart (Taurus = 6th sign from Sagittarius), but in Bhava Chalit it falls in Bhava 5 range (5°–35°)  –  a meaningful shift from enemies/service to children/creativity.
exampleShiftNote.te: Now imagine Mars at Taurus 3° (= 33° sidereal). It would still be House 6 in the Rashi chart (Taurus = 6th sign from Sagittarius), but in Bhava Chalit it falls in Bhava 5 range (5°–35°)  –  a meaningful shift from enemies/service to children/creativity.
exampleShiftNote.bn: Now imagine Mars at Taurus 3° (= 33° sidereal). It would still be House 6 in the Rashi chart (Taurus = 6th sign from Sagittarius), but in Bhava Chalit it falls in Bhava 5 range (5°–35°)  –  a meaningful shift from enemies/service to children/creativity.

ctaBody.en: Generate your Kundali to see your personal Bhava Chalit analysis  –  which planets shift, what it means for prediction, and how your Rashi and Bhava Chalit readings compare.
ctaBody.hi: अपनी व्यक्तिगत भाव चलित विश्लेषण देखने के लिए अपनी कुण्डली बनाएँ  –  कौन से ग्रह स्थानान्तरित होते हैं, भविष्यवाणी के लिए इसका क्या अर्थ है, और आपकी राशि और भाव चलित व्याख्याओं की तुलना कैसे होती है।
ctaBody.mai: अपन कुंडली बनाउ अपन व्यक्तिगत भाव चलित विश्लेषण देखबाक लेल – कोन ग्रह सभ बदलैत अछि, फलादेशक लेल एकर की अर्थ अछि, आ अहाँक राशि आ भाव चलितक फलादेश केना तुलना करैत अछि।
ctaBody.ta: Generate your Kundali to see your personal Bhava Chalit analysis  –  which planets shift, what it means for prediction, and how your Rashi and Bhava Chalit readings compare.
ctaBody.te: Generate your Kundali to see your personal Bhava Chalit analysis  –  which planets shift, what it means for prediction, and how your Rashi and Bhava Chalit readings compare.
ctaBody.bn: Generate your Kundali to see your personal Bhava Chalit analysis  –  which planets shift, what it means for prediction, and how your Rashi and Bhava Chalit readings compare.

crossRefBhavasDesc.en: Learn what each house governs  –  personality, wealth, courage, through to liberation.
crossRefBhavasDesc.hi: जानें प्रत्येक भाव क्या नियंत्रित करता है  –  व्यक्तित्व, धन, साहस से लेकर मोक्ष तक।
crossRefBhavasDesc.mai: सीखू जे प्रत्येक भाव की शासित करैत अछि – व्यक्तित्व, धन, साहस, मोक्षक धरि।
crossRefBhavasDesc.ta: Learn what each house governs  –  personality, wealth, courage, through to liberation.
crossRefBhavasDesc.te: Learn what each house governs  –  personality, wealth, courage, through to liberation.

crossRefAdvancedHousesDesc.en: Placidus, Sripati, Koch  –  a deep comparison of house division methods.
crossRefAdvancedHousesDesc.hi: प्लेसिडस, श्रीपति, कोच  –  भाव विभाजन विधियों की गहन तुलना।
crossRefAdvancedHousesDesc.mai: प्लासिडस, श्रीपति, कोच – भाव विभाजन विधि सभक एकटा गहन तुलना।
crossRefAdvancedHousesDesc.ta: Placidus, Sripati, Koch  –  a deep comparison of house division methods.
crossRefAdvancedHousesDesc.te: Placidus, Sripati, Koch  –  a deep comparison of house division methods.

crossRefKundaliDesc.en: Start from scratch  –  what is a kundali and how to read your own.
crossRefKundaliDesc.hi: शुरू से जानें  –  कुण्डली क्या है और अपनी कुण्डली कैसे पढ़ें।
crossRefKundaliDesc.mai: शुरू सँ शुरू करू – कुंडली की अछि आ अपन कुंडली केना पढ़ब।
crossRefKundaliDesc.ta: Start from scratch  –  what is a kundali and how to read your own.
crossRefKundaliDesc.te: Start from scratch  –  what is a kundali and how to read your own.

crossRefLagnaDesc.en: The ascendant degree is the foundation of Bhava Chalit  –  understand why it matters.
crossRefLagnaDesc.hi: लग्न अंश भाव चलित की नींव है  –  समझें यह क्यों महत्वपूर्ण है।
crossRefLagnaDesc.mai: लग्नक अंश भाव चलितक आधार अछि – बुझू जे ई किएक महत्वपूर्ण अछि।
crossRefLagnaDesc.ta: The ascendant degree is the foundation of Bhava Chalit  –  understand why it matters.
